caption: A man with blond hair, glasses, and white over-ear headphones sits in a room before a dark blue screen displaying the number "20". He is wearing a dark blue t-shirt and sits behind a black microphone. To his left, a Christmas tree is decorated with colorful red, blue, and green lights. The background consists of a light-colored wood-paneled wall. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expression changes. Initially, he has a neutral expression with his mouth slightly open. He then transitions into a more surprised or emphatic expression, with his mouth opening wider and his eyebrows slightly raised, conveying a reaction to something occurring off-camera. The setting, clothing, and equipment remain consistent throughout the frames.
